title: LncRNA TUG1 attenuates ischaemia-reperfusion-induced apoptosis of renal tubular epithelial cells by sponging miR-144-3p via targeting Nrf2.
abstract:
LncRNA TUG1 attenuates ischaemia-reperfusion-induced apoptosis of renal tubular 
epithelial cells by sponging miR-144-3p via targeting Nrf2.
query: renal tubular injury transcriptomics biomarker prediction model
